ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANTS' PERSON(S) MOST KNOWLEDGABLE AND DENYING PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF TONY LIU'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF PMK AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. IF DEFENDANT GHNAIM AGREES TO SERVE AS THE PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEFENDANT MOBILE AUTO CONCEPTS INC., HE MAY GIVE BINDING TESTIMONY FOR IT. THE DEPOSITION MUST OCCUR BEFORE JANUARY 10, 2020. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. EXERCISING MY DISCRETION, I FIND THAT AN AWARD OF SANCTIONS WOULD BE UNJUST FOR PURPOSES OF CCP 2025.410. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SCOTT BORROWMAN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-11-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-14-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Deposition Of Pmk And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew /D. Weaver, Esq., Scott Cole & Assocaites, 510-891-9800, appearing for Plaintiff;
Wally Ghnaim, 415-531-2703, appearing on his own behalf as Pro Per Defendant
No other appearance.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TONY LIU'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Pmk And Request For Monetary Sanctions

The motion to compel a deposition date is GRANTED. If Defendant Ghnaim agrees to serve as the person most knowledgeable for Defendant Mobile Auto Concepts Inc., he may give binding testimony for it. The deposition must occur before January 10, 2020. The request for sanctions is DENIED. Exercising my discretion, I find that an award of sanctions would be unjust for purposes of CCP 2025.410.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin R. Elliott, Esq. of SHEA & MCINTYRE, T:408.298.6611, counsel for defendant, and moving party, on Court Call;
Wally M. Ghnaim, T:415.265.3262, defendant;
Andrew D. Weaver, Esq. of SCOTT COLE & ASSOCIATES, APC, T:510.891.9800, for plaintiff, on Court Call.

RULING: Hearing held. Mr. Ghnaim, defendant, does not oppose the motion. Plaintiff's counsel informs the Court of an upcoming discovery motion presently set for December 19, 2019. After hearing,

SHEA & MCINTYRE, PC's MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS MOBILE AUTO CONCEPTS INC. and WALEED GHNAIM is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
